The '''Malenstorr system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kaellin III]].
